title: SunSystems User Administration
checks: Verify Normal User permissions: view own profile only
Confirm Normal User restrictions: cannot modify profile, no administrative access
Validate SunSystems Administrator permissions: create user, edit user, copy user, delete user, assign groups, manage authentication
Confirm Finance Department Head as business owner
Verify auditors: Internal Audit, External Audit
recommended_actions: Access levels Normal User capabilities: View own details only
Access levels Administrator capabilities: Add users, edit users, view all users, copy users, delete users
Group membership requirement: Admin access requires SunSystems Administrator group
User creation: Login as administrator
User creation: Navigate to 'Security Users (SEU)'
User creation: Click create_user

User creation configure General tab: username: logon_name, full_name: complete_name, description: job_title_or_department, title: position, preferred_language: ui_language, email_address: user_email, photo: optional
User creation: Assign user groups
User creation configure Operator settings: operator_code: three_characters, default_business_unit, default_ledger, language, temporary_work_folder, default_transaction_date
User creation configure Authentication: standard_authentication enabled: true, password_required: true, windows_authentication: optional, directory_service_authentication: optional
User creation configure Authorization: enabled: true, authorization_password_required: true
User creation: Save user
User modification: Select user from grid
User modification: Click edit_user
User modification: Modify required fields
User modification: Save or cancel changes
User copying: Select existing user
User copying: Click copy_user
User copying: Enter new identity: username, full_name
User copying: Modify additional details
User copying: Save user
User deletion types: Mark as deleted (deny access but retain record, reversible)
User deletion types: Permanent delete (remove user record, irreversible)
Permanent delete conditions: User must be marked deleted first, user has no static data or transactions
Administrator account recovery trigger: administrator_account_locked
Administrator recovery: Login to application server as admin
Administrator recovery: Ensure all users logged out
Administrator recovery: Navigate to 'C:\ProgramData\Infor\SunSystems\Security'
Administrator recovery: Open file: Global.Config
Administrator recovery: Modify setting from '<serveradminaccess>0</serveradminaccess>' to '<serveradminaccess>1</serveradminaccess>'
Administrator recovery: Save file
Administrator recovery: Restart service: SunSystems Security Service
Administrator recovery: Open user manager without login
Administrator recovery: Perform recovery actions: unlock_account, reset_password
Administrator recovery: Revert setting in Global.Config
Administrator recovery: Restart service: SunSystems Security Service
Verification: User can login
Verification: Group permissions effective
Verification: Authorization levels correct
Verification: Audit trail generated
notes: Risks: Administrator recovery procedure requires server access
Security controls: Authorization password for transactions
Escalation path Level 1: SunSystems Administrator (routine user management)
Escalation path Level 2: Finance Systems Support (technical issues)
Escalation path Level 3: Finance Management (business impact)
Escalation path Level 4: Head ICT (security or system concerns)
Compliance standards: Financial system access controls
